postReview.title: Brentford 1-1 Arsenal: La ventaja del líder se reduce a cuatro puntos tras el empate de Lewis-Potter
postReview.description: Keane Lewis-Potter respondió al tanto inicial de Noni Madueke y el Brentford rescató un 1-1 ante el líder de la Premier League, el Arsenal.

postReview.title: Brentford 1-1 Arsenal: Visitors' lead by four points after Lewis-Potter leveller
postReview.description: Keane Lewis-Potter cancelled out Noni Madueke's opener as Brentford earned a 1-1 draw against Premier League leaders Arsenal.

postReview.title: Brentford 1-1 Arsenal: visitantes seguem na liderança com quatro pontos após empate de Lewis-Potter
postReview.description: Keane Lewis-Potter anulou o gol de Noni Madueke, e o Brentford arrancou um empate por 1 a 1 com o líder da Premier League, o Arsenal.

postReview.title: Brentford-Arsenal 1-1: il vantaggio dei Gunners si riduce a quattro punti dopo il pari di Lewis-Potter
postReview.description: Lewis-Potter risponde a Madueke: Brentford ferma sull'1-1 la capolista Arsenal

postReview.title: Brentford 1-1 Arsenal : l'avance des Gunners réduite à quatre points après l'égalisation de Lewis-Potter
postReview.description: Lewis-Potter répond à Madueke, Brentford accroche Arsenal (1-1)

postReview.title: Brentford 1:1 Arsenal: Spitzenreiter nur noch mit vier Punkten Vorsprung nach Lewis-Potter-Ausgleich
postReview.description: Keane Lewis-Potter machte Noni Maduekes Führungstreffer zunichte, Brentford erkämpfte sich beim 1:1 gegen Premier-League-Spitzenreiter Arsenal einen Punkt.

postReview.title: برنتفورد 1-1 أرسنال: الصدارة تتقلص إلى أربع نقاط بعد هدف التعادل من لويس-بوتر
postReview.description: ألغى كين لويس-بوتر هدف نوني مادويكي الافتتاحي ليخرج برنتفورد بتعادل 1-1 أمام متصدر الدوري الإنجليزي الممتاز أرسنال.

postReview.title: Brentford 1-1 Arsenal: Líderes ficam com apenas quatro pontos de vantagem após empate de Lewis-Potter
postReview.description: Keane Lewis-Potter anulou o golo inicial de Noni Madueke, e o Brentford arrancou um empate 1-1 frente ao líder da Premier League, o Arsenal.

preReview.title: Preview: Arsenal out to defend their advantage away to Brentford
Tenemos que centrarnos en lo nuestro – Arteta pide al Arsenal que no mire por encima del hombro en la pelea por el título
preReview.description: La ventaja del Arsenal en lo alto podría quedarse en solo tres puntos para el saque inicial del jueves, pero Mikel Arteta no está pendiente de los equipos que vienen por detrás.

preReview.title: Temos que nos concentrar na gente – Arteta pede que Arsenal não olhe para trás na briga pelo título
preReview.description: A vantagem do Arsenal na liderança pode cair para apenas três pontos até o pontapé inicial de quinta-feira, mas Mikel Arteta não está olhando tanto para os times que vêm atrás.

preReview.title: 'Dobbiamo pensare a noi' – Arteta invita l'Arsenal a non guardarsi alle spalle nella lotta per il titolo
preReview.description: Il vantaggio dell'Arsenal in vetta potrebbe ridursi a soli tre punti entro il calcio d'inizio di giovedì, ma Mikel Arteta non dà troppo peso alle squadre che inseguono.

preReview.title: « Nous devons nous concentrer sur nous-mêmes » : Arteta appelle Arsenal à ne pas regarder derrière dans la course au titre
preReview.description: L’avance d’Arsenal en tête pourrait n’être plus que de trois points au coup d’envoi jeudi, mais Mikel Arteta ne se concentre pas sur les équipes derrière.

preReview.title: „Wir müssen auf uns schauen“ – Arteta fordert Arsenal auf, im Titelrennen nicht nach hinten zu blicken
preReview.description: Arsenals Vorsprung an der Spitze könnte zum Anpfiff am Donnerstag nur noch drei Punkte betragen, doch Mikel Arteta schaut nicht allzu sehr auf die Teams dahinter.

preReview.title: علينا أن نركز على أنفسنا – أرتيتا يحث أرسنال على عدم الالتفات لما وراءه في صراع اللقب
preReview.description: قد يتقلص تقدم أرسنال في الصدارة إلى ثلاث نقاط فقط بحلول صافرة انطلاق الخميس، لكن ميكل أرتيتا لا ينشغل كثيراً بما تفعله الفرق التي تلاحقه.

preReview.title: Temos de nos concentrar em nós – Arteta pede ao Arsenal para não olhar por cima do ombro na luta pelo título
preReview.description: A vantagem do Arsenal no topo pode ser de apenas três pontos no apito inicial de quinta-feira, mas Mikel Arteta não está a dar demasiada atenção às equipas que vêm atrás.

translations.estimated_transfer_value_description:
Estimated Transfer Value (ETV) is an estimate of what a player could be worth if they were sold today.

It’s calculated using historical transfer data and a range of performance and context factors, including:

• player performance and development
• age and future potential
• how often and at what level they play
• position
• team and league strength
• remaining contract length

ETV focuses on the player themselves, not rumours or which club might buy them.

The value is updated regularly to reflect changes over time.
translations.xG_onboarding_description:
Expected goals is a measurement of the quality of a shot.

A team’s xG number for a match is an indication of how many goals they could have been expected to score, given the chances they created.

translations.defensive_actions_explained: Defensive contributions is the sum of attempted tackles, blocks, clearances, and interceptions.
translations.stats_comparison_explanation:
The Player Traits chart highlights a player's statistical strengths and weaknesses, in comparison to similar players.

Each stat is adjusted on a per 90 basis and includes matches from the past 365 days.

Players are then compared to positional peers from similar leagues, and placed into a percentile ranking. For example, a player with a 90% percentile ranking on Chances Created means that they create more chances than 90% of players in their position in similar leagues.

Full details on comparisons can be read in our FAQ.
translations.per_90_bar_explanation_text:
The bar graph shows how a player compares to other players in their position on each stat for the currently selected competition. A green bar graph indicates they are among the best in their position at that stat, while a red bar indicates they are among the worst.

The length of the bar graph represents the rank of the player for each stat, based on percentile. Players are compared only against their positional peers from the currently selected competition.

translations.xpts_explanation:
Expected Points (xPts) reflect the number of points a team was expected to earn from a match, based on the quality of their chances measured by Expected Goals (xG).

xPts for a match are calculated by simulating possible outcomes using the quality of shots, expressed as xG. The simulation awards points for wins, draws, or losses based on xG.

The xPts are accumulated over the season to form the 'xG-table', also known as the 'Justice table', which provides an alternative view of team performance beyond actual points earned.
translations.xpts_explanation_green_numbers: Green numbers indicate better underlying numbers than a team's actual results.
translations.xpts_explanation_red_numbers: Red numbers indicate worse underlying numbers than a team's actual results.
translations.site_description_league_table_xg: %1$s %2$s ranked by expected points (xPts). See %1$s xG table, or justice table for %2$s and other seasons on FotMob.
translations.xg_table_explanation:
The xG table ranks teams based on their expected goals (xG) stats.

• Green numbers mean a team is doing better than expected.
• Red numbers mean a team is doing worse than expected.
• The small number next to the xG value shows the difference between expected and actual performance.

For more details on how it’s calculated, check the FAQ.
translations.play_offs_explanation:
The play-off matchups are determined by a draw. In each grouping, the two teams on the left are drawn against the two teams on the right to create two play-off matchups. The play-offs are played over two legs, with the winner going to the round of 16.

There is a separate draw for the round of 16 using the same process.

translations.estimated_transfer_value_description:
Estimated Transfer Value (ETV) is an estimate of what a player could be worth if they were sold today.

It’s calculated using historical transfer data and a range of performance and context factors, including:

• player performance and development
• age and future potential
• how often and at what level they play
• position
• team and league strength
• remaining contract length

ETV focuses on the player themselves, not rumours or which club might buy them.

The value is updated regularly to reflect changes over time.
translations.xG_onboarding_description:
Expected goals is a measurement of the quality of a shot.

A team’s xG number for a match is an indication of how many goals they could have been expected to score, given the chances they created.
translations.fotmob_is_the_essential_app: FotMob is the essential football app.

translations.stats_comparison_explanation:
The Player Traits chart highlights a player's statistical strengths and weaknesses, in comparison to similar players.

Each stat is adjusted on a per 90 basis and includes matches from the past 365 days.

Players are then compared to positional peers from similar leagues, and placed into a percentile ranking. For example, a player with a 90% percentile ranking on Chances Created means that they create more chances than 90% of players in their position in similar leagues.

Full details on comparisons can be read in our FAQ.
translations.per_90_bar_explanation_text:
The bar graph shows how a player compares to other players in their position on each stat for the currently selected competition. A green bar graph indicates they are among the best in their position at that stat, while a red bar indicates they are among the worst.

The length of the bar graph represents the rank of the player for each stat, based on percentile. Players are compared only against their positional peers from the currently selected competition.
translations.stats_comparison_att_mid_wingers: Stats compared to other attacking midfielders/wingers

translations.xpts_explanation:
Expected Points (xPts) reflect the number of points a team was expected to earn from a match, based on the quality of their chances measured by Expected Goals (xG).

xPts for a match are calculated by simulating possible outcomes using the quality of shots, expressed as xG. The simulation awards points for wins, draws, or losses based on xG.

The xPts are accumulated over the season to form the 'xG-table', also known as the 'Justice table', which provides an alternative view of team performance beyond actual points earned.
translations.xpts_explanation_green_numbers: Green numbers indicate better underlying numbers than a team's actual results.
translations.xpts_explanation_red_numbers: Red numbers indicate worse underlying numbers than a team's actual results.
translations.site_description_league_table_xg: %1$s %2$s ranked by expected points (xPts). See %1$s xG table, or justice table for %2$s and other seasons on FotMob.
translations.xg_table_explanation:
The xG table ranks teams based on their expected goals (xG) stats.

• Green numbers mean a team is doing better than expected.
• Red numbers mean a team is doing worse than expected.
• The small number next to the xG value shows the difference between expected and actual performance.

For more details on how it’s calculated, check the FAQ.
translations.play_offs_explanation:
The play-off matchups are determined by a draw. In each grouping, the two teams on the left are drawn against the two teams on the right to create two play-off matchups. The play-offs are played over two legs, with the winner going to the round of 16.

There is a separate draw for the round of 16 using the same process.
